identity.canonical_title: Define Time Varying Axis Direction Adjustable Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID5615 records Define Time Varying Axis Direction Adjustable Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\main.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $. Define a \textbf{time-varying axis direction} (the adjustable polarization axis) as a unit vector \begin{equation} \hat{\bm{n}}(t)=\hat{\bm{n}}(\Theta(t),\Phi(t)), \end{equation} where $
